case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. vs. LUANGRATH, KHAMMONE et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LUANGRATH, KHAMMONE DAOHEUNAG, KHAMKO
